meaning: n.[圣经]耶稣被钉死于十字架之地
examples: In the light of Calvary, all our supposed goodness is nothing but filthy rags.
After Calvary, God has nothing left to prove to anyone.
God can bring good out of the worst evil. He did at Calvary.
The horse, riders, and the whole Calvary left the barn a long, long time ago.
Charlie Company, from the 1st Calvary Division, had stumbled upon a massive underground bunker of North Vietnamese troops.
